新城堡對holding念念不忘
繼續報價

Arsenal don’t want to loan Calum Chambers this summer, amid interest from a number of Premier League clubs in a transfer.

Andy Ridgwell reports that Arsenal aren’t too keen on letting Calum Chambers leave on loan this month. The defender is drawing interest from Fulham and Leeds United, but it would really have to be a permanent transfer to convince the Gunners.

The Daily Star add that Newcastle United are also in the mix, and TEAMtalk listed Newcastle and West Ham in the race. Steve Bruce’s side missed out on Rob Holding on loan after Mikel Arteta decided to keep him.

According to the Star’s report, Arsenal want £12m for Chambers, but I’d take that with a pinch of salt.

As I pointed out earlier this week, it wouldn’t be a huge surprise to see Chambers leave. He’s returning from a long-term injury as one of too many centre-back options at the club.

Even now, with injuries to Shkodran Mustafi and Sokratis Papastathopoulos, Arsenal still have David Luiz, Gabriel Magalhaes, Rob Holding, William Saliba and Kieran Tierney to fill the back three.

Arguably, Chambers was Arsenal’s form centre-back before his injury. He’s certainly shown flashes of his quality in recent spells. The club may well still see a future for him in North London.

But he’s not a nailed-on starter and could raise some good money. As long as they’re asking for more than £12m.

Tierney in or out? Arsenal team news update pre-Leicester

Arsenal travel to Leicester in the Carabao Cup on Wednesday looking to make it 3 wins from 3, so who is not fit to play?

Arsenal played West Ham on Saturday, losing Kieran Tierney to a hip problem before the game kicked off.

Speaking after Arsenal stole the points from the Hammers, Mikel Arteta confirmed the club didn’t think the issue was serious and it was more of a cautionary move, but Tierney has problems in this area and it’s certainly something to keep an eye on.

David Luiz, however, was back on the bench after his neck spasms sorted themselves out.

Others who were already out, Pablo Mari (ankle), Gabriel Martinelli (knee), Shkodran Mustafi (hamstring), Sokratis (calf/transferitis), Emile Smith Rowe (shoulder), and Calum Chambers (knee) will not feature.

Pablo Mari
Expected back in training at the end of September.

Gabriel Martinelli
Expected back in training in December.

Shkodran Mustafi
Expected back in training at the end of September.

Sokratis
Has a mild calf strain that was only expected to keep him out against Fulham. Is likely to be sold and it’s unclear if he actually is injured or, like Lucas Toreirra, being kept safe for sale.

Emile Smith Rowe
Expected back in training at the end of this week.

Calum Chambers
Expected back in training in October.

Lyon President Claims Arsenal Are Refusing to Meet Houssem Aouar Asking Price

Lyon's president Jean-Michel Aulas has attempted to pour cold water on Arsenal's interest in Houssem Aouar by claiming that he doesn't feel the Gunners want to pay the player's asking price.
Mikel Arteta has already added Gabriel Magalhaes, Willian and Dani Ceballos to his ranks this season, while loan deals for Cedric Soares and Pablo Mari were made permanent, but bolstering the midfield has remained high on his list of priorities this summer.

One of the names heavily linked with a move to north London is Aouar, who has been one of the standout players in Ligue 1 in the past few seasons and was fundamental in Lyon reaching the Champions League semi-finals last term.

Arsenal have already seen one bid knocked back - Matteo Guendouzi plus cash - with it expected the club will return with an improved offer before the transfer window shuts. However, Aulas has made comments suggesting otherwise, indicating the Gunners either don't want to, or can't afford his valutation - thought to be around £55m.

"No I don't think so [on whether Arsenal will sign Aouar], no offer yet," he told journalist Chris Wheatley. "It seems that Arsenal don't want to, or can't invest the price for Houssem, who is our best player."

It's widely understood that in order for Arteta to bring any new faces to the Emirates he will have to balance the books with player sales. His interest in Aouar is well documented, but there needs to be movement elsewhere first.

A number of first-team stars have been linked with a move away, including Lucas Torreira, who has not been involved in either matchday squad in the Premier League so far. A Serie A return is mooted, while Sokratis, Sead Kolasinac and Guendouzi are some of the other names who could also depart.

Arteta saw his side trudge to a 2-1 win over West Ham on Saturday, and after the game indicated strongly that he is still looking to add to his squad before 5 October.

"Well, depending on what happens with some other players... As I say again, we are open to discussions, the market can surprise us," he said. "[Teams] can come for any of our players in different positions and we have to react, like it happened with Emi. So let's see what happens."

阿迪達認有運：若數月前已輸了

【Now Sports】阿仙奴在周六英超尾場以2:1絕殺到訪的韋斯咸，領隊阿迪達直言有點幸運。
阿仙奴雖然在季初打出強勢，但今場表現回落，全場只有7次攻門，反而韋斯咸有14次，多出一倍。阿迪達（Mikel Arteta）說：「我們在某些時候確實有點幸運，但同時也找到了取勝的方法。」

「我喜歡球員在最後25分鐘的表現，就算有點回落，但之後重新振作。也許在數月前，我們會賽和或輸掉這場，但今天我們贏了。你總得想辦法，因為整季都有這樣的比賽。」阿迪達續說。

年輕射手基迪亞絕殺得手，傳中的正是上場跟他爆發輕微衝突的中場施巴約斯，「我們很快就和好了，他的助攻很漂亮，現在大家只有愛。我希望一直進步，建功的感覺太好了。」

阿迪達認有運：若數月前已輸了

【Now Sports】阿仙奴在周六英超尾場以2:1絕殺到訪的韋斯咸，領隊阿迪達直言有點幸運。
阿仙奴雖然在季初打出強勢，但今場表現回落，全場只有7次攻門，反而韋斯咸有14次，多出一倍。阿迪達（Mikel Arteta）說：「我們在某些時候確實有點幸運，但同時也找到了取勝的方法。」

「我喜歡球員在最後25分鐘的表現，就算有點回落，但之後重新振作。也許在數月前，我們會賽和或輸掉這場，但今天我們贏了。你總得想辦法，因為整季都有這樣的比賽。」阿迪達續說。

年輕射手基迪亞絕殺得手，傳中的正是上場跟他爆發輕微衝突的中場施巴約斯，「我們很快就和好了，他的助攻很漂亮，現在大家只有愛。我希望一直進步，建功的感覺太好了。」
